topic: What great stems look like — the technical spec

slides.eyebrow: Education · What great stems look like — the technical spec
slides.headline: Your track got shortlisted.
Here's what you need to know:
slides.lede: The supervisor likes it. The picture edit is locked. · Then they ask: "Can I get stems?"
list_items: The supervisor likes it. The picture edit is locked.
Then they ask: "Can I get stems?"

slides.headline: What happens in the next 2 hours determines whether you get the deal.
slides.lede: Here's what professional stems look like. ↓

slides.headline:
WHAT STEMS ACTUALLY ARE:
Separate audio exports of each main element in your track.
slides.lede:
Not a "no drums" version. Not a "no music" version.
Individual layers that can be mixed independently.

slides.headline: Here's what you need to know:
slides.lede: THE STANDARD STEM CATEGORIES: · Full mix (the complete, mastered track) · Drums and percussion (isolated) · Bass (isolated)
list_items: Vocals (if applicable — main and backing separate)

slides.headline: Here's what you need to know:
slides.lede: THE TECHNICAL SPEC: · Format: 24-bit WAV, 48kHz (broadcast standard) · Length: same as full mix, to the exact sample · Peak level: –6dBFS maximum
list_items: Length: same as full mix, to the exact sample

slides.headline: Here's what you need to know:
slides.lede: THE DELIVERY STANDARD: · Packaged in a single named folder · Shared via Google Drive or Dropbox (link ready to send) · Delivered in under 2 hours. Ideally under 30 minutes.
list_items: Packaged in a single named folder
Shared via Google Drive or Dropbox (link ready to send)
Delivered in under 2 hours. Ideally under 30 minutes.

slides.headline: When a director wants to drop out percussion for a quiet scene, they need your drums stem.
slides.lede:
When an editor needs to extend a section, they need your loops.
If you can't deliver stems cleanly and fast, another composer gets the placement.

slides.headline:
Build your stem library as you produce.
Not after the brief arrives.
Open briefs. Every Tuesday.
slides.lede: Composers: apply once, get matched for life. Supervisors: shortlist in 48h.
